desperate: I won't forget what you did.
You gave us hope when we had none.
I didn't think anyone would come.
You answered when no one else would.
somber: Some wounds take longer to heal.
bold: I knew you had it in you.
conflicted: I hope we did the right thing.
Time will tell if this was worth it.
Not a clean ending, but an ending.
conspiratorial: Best if we don't speak of this again.
The truth is out. That's what matters.
